Forties.text:
Wind
In east, southeasterly 6 to gale 8. In west, south becoming cyclonic, 4 to 6, then northwest 5 to 7, perhaps gale 8 later.
Sea state

In east, rain or sleet. In west, sleet, then wintry showers.

In east, good, occasionally poor. In west, good, occasionally poor.
